notes: All files written to correct src/ paths within worktree (NOT to autonomous-dev/ paths — this was the iter 98 failure). No git add -f used. Migration 020 creates templates table with JSONB template_data, RLS via can_access_workspace(), and update_updated_at trigger. Template types (Template, TemplateData, TemplateSectionData, TemplateStepData, TemplateConnectionData, TemplateStepRoleData) added to database.ts. POST /api/v1/templates: validates section belongs to workspace, snapshots section+steps+connections+step_roles as JSONB (positions relative to section origin). POST /api/v1/templates/[id]/deploy: UUID remapping via Map for steps+connections, role-by-name matching for step_roles (silently skips unmatched). DELETE /api/v1/templates/[id]: returns 404 on PGRST116. STARTER_TEMPLATES has 4 entries (Customer Onboarding, Support Ticket, Content Creation, Lead Nurturing) with 5 steps each. Client wrappers: fetchTemplates, createTemplate, deployTemplate, deleteTemplate.
